questionHtml: Describe the quark structure of a baryon.
markschemeHtml:
3 quarks / example with three quarks «e.g. up up down» ✓

integer / zero / 1 / no fractional «electron» charge
OR
held together by the strong force / gluons
OR
half integer spin
OR
baryon number = 1
OR
colour neutral ✓
